description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a slim, dark bezel. The front features a large, blue-tinted screen with a subtle grid pattern, and a small Dell logo centered on the lower bezel. The monitor is supported by a robust, geometric stand with a metallic finish and a rectangular base, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The rear panel is matte black with a textured, faceted pattern, and the stand attaches centrally with a visible cable management hole. No buttons or ports are visible on the front, sides, or rear in these views. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for office or public urban environments.
description: A sleek, flat-panel Dell computer monitor with a blue display, slim dark bezel, and a sturdy metallic stand. The rear features a textured black panel and a geometric stand with cable management.
description_view_0: Side view showing the monitor's slim profile and the angular, metallic stand extending backward.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the matte black, faceted back panel and the central stand with a cable management hole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the thinness of the display and the geometric design of the stand.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the large blue screen, slim bezel, and the Dell logo centered on the bottom bezel.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, dark gray or black, with a matte finish and straight edges. It is uniform in thickness on all sides, with slightly rounded corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular flat base stand with a geometric, faceted vertical support column in metallic silver. The stand is robust and features a central cable management hole, with no visible height or tilt adjustment mechanisms.
attribute_button_placement: A single power button is implied on the lower right bezel, but no physical buttons are clearly visible in the images.
attribute_brand_logo: A Dell logo is present, centered on the bottom bezel of the front face, in white text.
